intro: Hunt the undead… and turn them into irresistible anime girls.
description:
They were once lost to the apocalypse… now they’re yours to reclaim.

In Zombie Hearts: Turn the Undead into Anime Girls, every battle is a chance to bring beauty back from decay.

Explore dangerous zones overrun by zombies. Fight, weaken, and capture them… then transform them into stunning anime girls with a dark, post-apocalyptic edge.

♥ HUNT, CAPTURE AND REVIVE
Face relentless waves of the undead and turn your enemies into something completely unexpected: your ideal anime girls.

♥ FROM DECAY TO DESIRE
Each girl carries traces of her past life. Their personalities, looks, and attitude reflect the zombie they once were… now reborn in a seductive new form.

♥ BUILD BONDS BEYOND SURVIVAL
Get closer to the girls you save. Unlock scenes, deepen your connection, and discover their hidden stories.

♥ UPGRADE AND DOMINATE
Earn rewards, improve your combat skills, and survive tougher encounters. The stronger you become, the more powerful and alluring your girls will be.

♥ UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE SCENES
Progress through the game to reveal special images and moments. Every victory brings you closer to uncovering everything they have to offer.


In a world ruled by the undead… will you fight them, or fall for them?
